description_long: This is a single-story stone house with a red-tiled gable roof covering a carport on one side. The house is surrounded by a low stone wall and features a lush garden with trees, shrubs, and potted plants in the backyard. The front facade has several windows and a main entry door, while the rear includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a small pool. The house interior is divided into multiple rooms, each with visible doors and windows, and the layout includes a garage under the carport. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored stone, and the roof over the main living area is flat, contrasting with the sloped carport roof. The property is landscaped with grass, flower beds, and paved walkways, creating a welcoming residential environment.
description: A single-story stone house with a red-tiled carport, flat and gable roofs, lush gardens, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with a red-tiled roof, main entry, and a large tree in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard garden, patio with outdoor seating, and a small pool.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garden, potted plants, and the flat-roofed section of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the carport, stone wall, and dense tree coverage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with multiple rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, and adjacent carport under a red-tiled gable roof
